description: A legacy payment processing application has been migrated to Kubernetes in the 'finance-ops' namespace. It writes logs to a local file at '/app/logs/transactions.log', and a 'fluent-bit' sidecar container is intended to tail this file and forward logs to stdout. Currently, the sidecar is misconfigured and the payment logs are not appearing in its output. Diagnose and fix the deployment and associated ConfigMap to ensure the sidecar successfully tails the log file and outputs it to stdout. You must preserve the sidecar architecture and not modify the 'app' container's command to log directly to stdout. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
